name: Kee Song Bio-Technology Holdings Limited
summary: Kee Song Bio-Technology Holdings Limited engages in the poultry and processing distribution, and farming business in Singapore, Malaysia, and Taiwan. The company also involves in importing, slaughtering, wholesaling, and retailing various types of poultry and consumable goods; layer and poultry farming; investment holding; property investment; processing and marketing of seafood and poultry related products; provision of supporting services for transportation; food catering; and manufacturing of poultry feed products. In addition, it offers whole chicken and cutting products. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
